title: digitaria sericea
intro: Digitaria sericea, also known as Woolly Panicum, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Digitaria sericea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes dried and made into a powder for use in traditional medicine.
